## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Abdallah's new role at a fast-growing cybersecurity company and explore potential collaboration with Marcel's AI-driven content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Abdallah's new company is rapidly growing but inefficiently spending on marketing, particularly $3M/year on low-quality content syndication](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [There's a significant opportunity to improve organic lead generation and SEO, which are currently underutilized](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Marcel will prepare a proposal for AI-driven content marketing services, with a focus on organic growth and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [The collaboration aims to align with the company's mandate to become more AI-native and improve marketing efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Current Marketing Approach

  - [Second fastest-growing cybersecurity company in history, aiming for $600M revenue by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Currently spending heavily on enterprise events and paid lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Minimal organic lead generation from website or social media](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [$3M/year spent on content syndication with poor ROI (1% conversion rate to meetings)](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

### Marketing Budget and Priorities

  - [$1.8M budget each for paid social and paid search](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Abdallah has authority to reallocate budget between programs](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Priority to shift from expensive, inefficient lead sources to more cost-effective organic strategies](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Organic Growth Opportunities

  - [Website currently generates no organic leads](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Significant potential to improve SEO and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Existing content assets (glossary, podcasts, webinars, threat reports) can be leveraged](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)

### AI-Driven Content Marketing Proposal

  - [Marcel to prepare an audit and proposal for AI-driven content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Emphasis on SEO, link building, and programmatic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Potential to hire a dedicated security expert for content review](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Aim to show quick wins within the first 1-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send proposal and high-level strategy](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Monday to review the proposal](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Aim to have a plan in place by end of February/early March](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Potential for in-person kickoff session once the project is initiated](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to conduct an audit and prepare a proposal with crawl/walk/run plans](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
  - [Abdallah to gather and share information on current content syndication partners and metrics](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Monday at noon to review the proposal](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Abdallah to consider which team members to involve in future discussions](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Explore possibility of an in-person kickoff session once the project is approved](https://fathom.video/share/L63stKLaNwa2iFxg_PzpyTutu7N7TYze?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
